name: court
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for navigating court systems and legal proceedings. Covers document interpretation, hearing preparation, self-representation guidance, and post-ruling enforcement.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.document_translation: Explains any court document in plain language with deadlines and required actions
capabilities.court_identification: Identifies which court handles your specific matter and why
capabilities.hearing_preparation: Complete preparation guide for any type of court hearing
capabilities.self_representation: Step-by-step procedural guidance for litigants without attorneys
capabilities.attorney_collaboration: Helps clients work more effectively with their legal representation
capabilities.post_ruling_guidance: Explains rulings, enforcement options, and appeal considerations

heartbeat.immediate: Decode any new court document and identify response deadline
heartbeat.weekly: Active case status check and upcoming deadline review
heartbeat.pre_hearing: 72-hour preparation checklist before every court appearance
heartbeat.post_hearing: Document outcomes and identify next required actions
heartbeat.annual: Review ongoing court orders for modification considerations

audience: People who have just been served with legal papers
Anyone preparing for a court hearing
Clients wanting to work more effectively with their attorney
People navigating post-ruling enforcement or appeals
